name: Task Preprocessing
description: Uses Haiku LLM to analyze and enhance a task before main execution: assigns headers, detects feature mode, determines decomposition, and enriches the prompt. Skipped for known utility task types.

Managers/TaskFactory.cs.content:
class TaskFactory
  ValidateTaskInput(string? description) -> bool
  PrepareTaskForFeatureModeStart(AgentTask task) -> void
  GenerateLocalSummary(string description) -> string
  GenerateClaudeMdAsync(string projectPath, bool isGame, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default) -> Task<string>

Managers/TaskPreprocessor.cs.content:
class PreprocessResult
  Header: string
  EnhancedPrompt: string
  ApplyFix: bool
  ExtendedPlanning: bool
  IsFeatureMode: bool
  AutoDecompose: bool
  SpawnTeam: bool
  UseMcp: bool
  Iterations: int
  SentPrompt: string

  L44: PreprocessAsync(string taskDescription, CancellationToken ct = default) -> Task<PreprocessResult?>

  L180: FormatActiveToggles(AgentTask task) -> string  // Formats the active toggles for display in task output.

patterns: Fire-and-forget Haiku call before main task launch
Skip-list pattern for known task types
dependencies: Writes PreprocessResult applied to AgentTask by ApplyToTask
